subcodes.first_line: Blessed be this Day whereon that which was promised in the Torah and the Gospel and in the Psalms hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الیوم الذی فیه ظهر ما کان موعودا فی التوراه و الانجیل و فی الزبور و
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
